title: Dto Change Status
description: Stable JSON wire shape for **Dto Change Status** returned by `@specd/api` and consumed by `@specd/client`. Field names feed OpenAPI and TypeScript types; presenters map kernel results into this shape without adding business rules.
context: Stable JSON wire shape for **Dto Change Status** returned by `@specd/api` and consumed by `@specd/client`. Field names feed OpenAPI and TypeScript types; presenters map kernel results into this shape without adding business rules.

rules.requirement: response JSON uses stable camelCase field names
rules: The **Dto Change Status** wire shape MUST use camelCase property names stable across Studio releases. OpenAPI generation MUST derive schemas from these names.

The type MUST include at least:

- `updatedAt: string` (ISO 8601) — revision clock from manifest
- `unchanged?: boolean` when conditional poll matches `ifModifiedSince`
- artifact DAG, blockers, `nextAction`, task completion, implementation projection
- `totalTasks?: number` and `completedTasks?: number` as change-level aggregate counters summed across all task-capable artifacts
- per-artifact `hasTasks: boolean` plus optional `totalTasks` / `completedTasks` when that artifact type is task-capable

rules.requirement: presenters map domain results without embedding rules
rules: [`api:presenter-change`](../presenter-change/spec.md) MUST map kernel or graph results into this DTO and MUST NOT embed lifecycle, validation, or approval logic.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Full success payload includes mandatory fields
Task-capable artifacts expose aggregate counters
given: kernel returns one or more task-capable artifacts
then: each task-capable artifact row includes hasTasks
AND the DTO includes change-level completedTasks / totalTasks summed across those artifacts
